sections.heading: Pathway
sections.content: [{"pathway_id":"duodenum_pmss_resectable","title":"Duodenal Adenocarcinoma (pMMR/MSS), Resectable","branching_basis":["Tumor location (duodenum)","MMR/MSI status (pMMR/MSS)","Resectability"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"Resectable duodenal SBA with pMMR/MSS status","options":[{"type":"Surgery","label":"Resection with en bloc removal of regional lymph nodes","preference":"Preferred","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":true,"summary":"Adjuvant treatment is guided by pathologic stage and high-risk features. See Adjuvant Treatment pathway (SBA-6)."}}]},{"pathway_id":"duodenum_pmss_unresectable","title":"Duodenal Adenocarcinoma (pMMR/MSS), Locally Unresectable or Medically Inoperable","branching_basis":["Tumor location (duodenum)","MMR/MSI status (pMMR/MSS)","Resectability","Obstruction status"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"Locally unresectable or medically inoperable duodenal SBA, pMMR/MSS","options":[{"type":"Palliative Procedure","label":"Palliative diversion or stent (if obstructed)","preference":"If applicable","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]},{"type":"Systemic Therapy","label":"FOLFOX or CAPEOX","preference":"Preferred intensive therapy","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":["FOLFOX","CAPEOX"]},{"type":"Systemic Therapy","label":"Fluorouracil/Leucovorin or Capecitabine","preference":"For non-intensive therapy","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":["Fluorouracil/Leucovorin","Capecitabine"]},{"type":"Systemic Therapy","label":"FOLFIRINOX","preference":"Alternative intensive therapy","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":["FOLFIRINOX"]},{"type":"Chemoradiotherapy","label":"Chemo/RT with capecitabine or infusional fluorouracil","preference":"Consider in selected cases","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":["Capecitabine + RT","Fluorouracil + RT"]}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":false,"summary":"Neoadjuvant intent. Reevaluate for conversion to resectable disease. If resectable, then surgical resection; otherwise, continue systemic therapy or consider MDT for RT."}}]},{"pathway_id":"duodenum_pmss_metastatic","title":"Duodenal Adenocarcinoma (pMMR/MSS), Distant Metastatic","branching_basis":["Tumor location (duodenum)","MMR/MSI status (pMMR/MSS)","Metastatic disease"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"Distant metastatic duodenal SBA, pMMR/MSS","options":[{"type":"Palliative Procedure","label":"Palliative diversion or stent (if obstructed)","preference":"If applicable","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]},{"type":"Systemic Therapy","label":"Metastatic Adenocarcinoma Regimens (see SBA-8)","preference":"Primary systemic therapy","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":["Various first-line and subsequent regimens"]}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":false,"summary":"Palliative intent. Management guided by principles of systemic therapy for metastatic disease (SBA-D) and MDT discussion."}}]},{"pathway_id":"duodenum_dmsh_resectable","title":"Duodenal Adenocarcinoma (dMMR/MSI-H or POLE/POLD1), Resectable","branching_basis":["Tumor location (duodenum)","MMR/MSI status (dMMR/MSI-H/POLE)","Resectability","Tumor bulk (T4/bulky)"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"Resectable duodenal SBA with dMMR/MSI-H or POLE/POLD1 mutation (ultra-hypermutated phenotype)","options":[{"type":"Surgery","label":"Resection with en bloc removal of regional lymph nodes","preference":"Standard approach","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]},{"type":"Neoadjuvant Immunotherapy","label":"Consider neoadjuvant checkpoint inhibitor immunotherapy (for T4 or bulky primary)","preference":"Option for select patients","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":["Various checkpoint inhibitor regimens (see SBA-D 2 of 12)"]}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":true,"summary":"Adjuvant treatment is guided by pathologic stage. See Adjuvant Treatment pathway (SBA-7). Note: The role of adjuvant immunotherapy for patients who received neoadjuvant immunotherapy is not defined."}}]},{"pathway_id":"duodenum_dmsh_unresectable","title":"Duodenal Adenocarcinoma (dMMR/MSI-H or POLE/POLD1), Locally Unresectable or Medically Inoperable","branching_basis":["Tumor location (duodenum)","MMR/MSI status (dMMR/MSI-H/POLE)","Resectability","Obstruction status"],"nodes":[{"criteria":"Locally unresectable or medically inoperable duodenal SBA, dMMR/MSI-H or POLE/POLD1","options":[{"type":"Palliative Procedure","label":"Palliative diversion or stent (if obstructed)","preference":"If applicable","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":[]},{"type":"Systemic Therapy","label":"Checkpoint inhibitor immunotherapy","preference":"Preferred for dMMR/MSI-H tumors","recommendation":"Category 2A","linked_regimen_ids":["Various checkpoint inhibitor r"],"_note":"The original text ends with 'Various checkpoint inhibitor r', likely truncated."}],"adjuvant_logic":{"applies":false,"summary":""}}]}

nodes.label: Resectable duodenal SBA with pMMR/MSS status
Resection with en bloc removal of regional lymph nodes

flowcharts.title: Duodenal Adenocarcinoma (pMMR/MSS), Locally Unresectable or Medically Inoperable

nodes.label: Locally unresectable or medically inoperable duodenal SBA, pMMR/MSS
Chemo/RT with capecitabine or infusional fluorouracil
Resectable duodenal SBA with dMMR/MSI-H or POLE/POLD1 mutation (ultra-hypermutated phenotype)
Resection with en bloc removal of regional lymph nodes
Consider neoadjuvant checkpoint inhibitor immunotherapy (for T4 or bulky primary)

nodes.label: Locally unresectable or medically inoperable duodenal SBA, dMMR/MSI-H or POLE/POLD1
